title: Operate chemical application machinery and equipment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate chemical application machinery and equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare chemical application machinery for use

pcs.text: Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
